clues.clue: Spill drops on small dish
Exactly what remains when husband and wife leave show?
Powerless committee members dog can bite badly
Frightened people may get this bit of teasing
Small area with gardens, bare white with patches of colour
Coin, reverse impressed with large stamp
Irrational and ridiculous, scrapping a book
Eat out and so on at hotel
Policeman about to go into inner working of old scientist
Picture biscuits straight from the oven?
Mostly drunk portrait painter is alone
Ugly deodorant sprayed in amicable manner
Creator of Big Brother’s fully behind men
Quietly snobby about Yankee resembling young boxer?
Old hat worn by one very reluctant to get involved
In shop ordered to follow a group safety directive
Not very good time to put up several patrols
Transport old phones (not black) and have half disconnected
Perhaps one unemployed comedian keeps bees for a change
Object of pagan worship endlessly hymned
Immigrant in centre of village I must welcome
Tours having time off now as airline grounded over a year
Drunken reveller returned to speak, obsessively controlling
Adolescent drops seed, husked, for a songbird
Worst and best places to break journey
Narrow lanes keeping European extremely vigilant
Picked up sections for binder
I’m surprised, when told, to be in debt

competition.prizeinfo: A £20 Waterstones voucher will be awarded for the first five randomly selected correct solutions. To enter, complete the crossword and submit your entry. 18+ only. Closing date is midnight on the first Wednesday after publication. Full T&Cs apply. Printed entries can be sent to: The Times Crossword 29538, PO Box 2164, Colchester, Essex CO2 8LJ.
